card.title: Create Prediction Market Organization
card.description: Register a top-level asset name that will serve as the parent for your prediction market sub-assets. Sub-assets issued under this organization (e.g. ASSET.0001) benefit from reduced creation fees and instant brand recognition.
card.updateDescription: Update your organization's identity, governance, and attestation details.

identity.title: Organization Identity
identity.description: Choose the symbol and details for your PMA organization

nft.title: Non-Fungible Token Metadata
nft.description: Optionally attach NFT metadata and IPFS media to your organization asset

pmo.title: Organization Profile
pmo.description: Define your organization's identity, governance, and attestation — the decentralized constitution for all sub-assets

symbol.label: Organization Symbol
symbol.help: The top-level asset symbol for your prediction market organization. Sub-assets will be issued as SYMBOL.0001, SYMBOL.0002, etc. Cannot contain a dot.

shortName.label: Short Name
shortName.help: A human-readable name for your organization asset.

description.label: Description
description.help: A description of your prediction market organization and what it represents.

market.label: Preferred Market
market.help: The preferred trading pair for this asset.

pmo.info: The PMO object is stored in the asset's description field and acts as your organization's decentralized Terms of Service. Sub-assets inherit this identity — investors can verify which organization issued a market by checking the parent asset's PMO object.

name.label: Organization Name
name.help: The official name of your prediction market organization.

manifest.label: Manifest URL
manifest.help: A URL to a hosted JSON file that maps your BitShares account public key to your official web presence, preventing impersonation assets.

resolution.label: Resolution Policy
resolution.help: How the organization resolves its prediction markets (e.g. API-driven, Expert Panel, Community Vote).
resolution.placeholder: e.g. All markets are resolved via a combination of oracle data and community governance vote...

dispute.label: Dispute Mechanism
dispute.help: Instructions for users if they disagree with a market resolution.
dispute.placeholder: e.g. Disputes must be submitted within 48 hours of resolution via the governance portal...

account.label: On-chain Account
account.help: The BitShares account name that governs this organization.

attestation.heading: Attestation
attestation.label: Issuer Attestation
attestation.help: A formal pledge that all markets under this organization will be resolved according to the stated policies. This is your brand's commitment to transparency.
attestation.placeholder: e.g. I, as the issuer of this asset, pledge that all markets under this organization will be resolved according to the policies stated herein.

summary.title: Review & Submit
summary.subtitle: Verify your organization details before creating
summary.name: Short Name

ready: All required fields are filled. Ready to create your PMA organization!
fieldsRequired: Please enter an organization symbol to continue.

tips.title: About PMA Organizations
tips.hint: Creating a prediction market organization registers a top-level asset name under which you can issue sub-assets at a significant discount. For example, registering 'ASSET' allows you to later create ASSET.0001, ASSET.0002, etc. — each at a lower fee than creating a standalone asset. Investors will recognize these sub-assets as belonging to your organization.
